---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

# 

## Email

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

### Primary

📧 <a href="mailto:cheshtaawork@gmail.com">cheshtaawork@gmail.com</a>

:::

::: {.column}

### University of Agder (UiA)

📧 <a href="mailto:cheshtaac@uia.no">cheshtaac@uia.no</a>

:::

::::

---


## Connect with me

💼 **LinkedIn**

[View my LinkedIn profile →](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cheshtaa-chitkara-phd-4b628712a/){target="_blank"}

---

> *I aim to respond to emails within the same working day.*
